holdings.name: NLC India
holdings.description: Government-owned lignite miner and power producer. Expanding into solar and wind. 5,000+ MW power capacity, 30+ MT annual lignite production. Stable PSU cash flows with high dividend yield.

holdings.name: Radico Khaitan
holdings.description: India's 2nd largest spirits marker. Rampur Single Malt gaining international acclaim. Prestige-and-above segment (Magic Moments, 8PM Black) driving premiumisation. Volume leader in UP, Rajasthan and MP.

holdings.name: Star Health Insurance
holdings.description: India's largest standalone health insurer with 14 million+ policies. Rising healthcare inflation and awareness driving claim frequency. Largest agency force (700,000+ agents) in health insurance. Rakesh Jhunjhunwala backing.

holdings.name: CEAT Ltd
holdings.description: India's 4th largest tyre maker. Strong in 2-wheeler, 3-wheeler and passenger car replacement markets. Halol and Nagpur plants ramping up. Export-focused EV-compatible tyre range in development.

holdings.name: Piramal Enterprises
holdings.description: Post-demerger PEL focuses on financial services (NBFC). Restructured retail lending portfolio recovering well. Wholesale book legacy being resolved. Healthcare business (OTC + pharma) provides stability.

holdings.name: Cyient Ltd
holdings.description: Engineering R&D services for aerospace, rail, utilities and communication sectors. Defence-grade avionics and satellite systems. DET (Design Engineering Technology) pivot under new management driving growth.
